steps.label: Name Your Heir
steps.prompt: What is your name, Heir of Ashburn?

steps.label: Choose Your Archetype
steps.prompt: What is your role at the Academy?

options.label: The Prefect
options.description: Authority and order. You hold the keys.

options.label: The Scholar
options.description: Knowledge is a weapon. You wield it well.

options.label: The Rebel
options.description: Rules are made to be broken. You prove it.

options.label: The Legacy
options.description: Your family name opens every door.

options.label: The Outsider
options.description: You don't belong here. That's your advantage.

options.label: House Ashwood
options.description: Old blood. Old money. Old grudges.

options.label: House Mirewood
options.description: The mystics. They hear what others cannot.
